title: Selected Hosting Architecture Production-Control Validation Readiness
description: Define exact production-control validation contracts, evidence requirements, provider responsibility boundaries, rollback obligations, and fail-closed stop conditions without manufacturing production evidence.
acceptance_criteria: All seven unresolved production controls have explicit validation contracts and evidence requirements
TEST substitutes remain distinguishable from production validation and cannot satisfy production gates
Provider and Enki responsibilities, failure criteria, evidence ownership, and rollback paths are explicit
Provider-neutral control-contract work can proceed before a hosting decision
Missing production capability fails closed rather than reopening architecture design
